title: Gren's Christmas Chests + Leaves
description: Changes the Chests, and some foliage to be more Christmas-y
body:
Celebrate this holiday season with this custom resource pack, making your minecraft world all the more merry!

Christmas chests(Not by me, but i had to fix some of their textures, due to UV flipping)Original Pack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/remastered-christmas-chests/

WARNING: NOT MADE FOR FAST LEAVES GRAPHICS

Christmas chests:
Chest, 
Enderchest, 
Trapped Chest, 
Double Chest, 
Double Trapped Chest

Entities:
Red Llama Carpet Pattern, 
Green Llama Carpet Pattern, 
Yellow Llama Carpet Pattern

Blocks:
Acacia Leaves, 
Birch Leaves, 
Oak Leaves, 
Spruce Leaves, 
Dark Oak Leaves, 
Jungle Leaves, 
Mangrove Leaves, 
Cherry Leaves, 
Azalea Leaves, 
Flowering Azalea Leaves, 
Azalea Plant, 
Flowering Azalea Plant, 
Saplings(Not Propagule), 
Dead Bush

Please report any bugs to me on discord @, GrenFlem, https://discord.gg/j8xhZBAhY6
